she's my melancholy.title: An Ode To What Everything Once Was, And What It Will Forever Be.
she's my melancholy.about: this album contains a lot of the feelings that i have. it's about nostalgia for the what i once had. and an uncertainty about what will forever be.

trackinfo.title: Express Your Beauty
trackinfo.about: this opener represents the opening of a new lifestyle. straying away from being introverted and sad instead going out into the world and expressing who i am in the process. a drastic change from being inside, introverted and hating the outside. i mean, some things never change. but i know that i can at least improve myself in this manner. it's good for me, even if its different.
trackinfo.credits: from An Ode To What Everything Once Was, And What It Will Forever Be., released August 11, 2021

trackinfo.title: The Hide
trackinfo.about: at my father's work there is a wooden bird hide. it was built around 2007. i went there just over a year ago for the first time in so long and i couldn't quite process how i felt. it was powerful. everything about it felt surreal because it was a part of my childhood. the outside world, nature, and everything like this is so beautiful. before i was an introverted mess who played games 24/7, i was a kid. i loved my village. i loved the place i live in. thinking back on these days is the most powerful emotion i can handle. i have so much nostalgia for this time, because i was just a child. a young child growing up in a small, rural and unrecognised county in england. my surrounding areas are and always will hold a special place inside my heart. the hide brings me back.
trackinfo.credits: from An Ode To What Everything Once Was, And What It Will Forever Be., released August 11, 2021

trackinfo.title: The Field and Forest behind my Old School
trackinfo.about: this also brings me back. my primary school was an amazing part of my life even though i hate to admit it. i would tell everyone i disliked it but the people and the environment there helped me become who i am. it fueled a huge part of me. i wouldn't have it another way. i feel like i really became someone and met people who changed my life forever there. the young kid who went to this school had no idea what would happen next. he had no idea how fortunate he was to grow up in such an amazing part of the country; an beautiful part of the world. the field and forest behind my old school was a special place. i made so many memories there. i had fun. everyone had fun. i wish i could sit there again.
trackinfo.credits: from An Ode To What Everything Once Was, And What It Will Forever Be., released August 11, 2021

trackinfo.title: Library Card
trackinfo.about: my mom gave me the library card i used to get books with when i was young. it has a photograph of sheep on it. when she gave me it i wanted to cry. it means the world to me. i used to read a lot when i was younger, and seeing my library card again took me back to those days. i don't often read anymore but i am thankful that i did. and the library card is a cute little piece of history.
trackinfo.credits: from An Ode To What Everything Once Was, And What It Will Forever Be., released August 11, 2021

trackinfo.title: The Summer You Thought of Nothing But Her
trackinfo.about: moving forwards in time. my friend had a rocky but memorable friendship with someone he loved so dearly. this is for the happy times they had because i know they meant a lot to eachother.
trackinfo.credits: from An Ode To What Everything Once Was, And What It Will Forever Be., released August 11, 2021

trackinfo.title: Everything Isn't What It Was
trackinfo.credits: from An Ode To What Everything Once Was, And What It Will Forever Be., released August 11, 2021

trackinfo.title: sky;moon
trackinfo.about: a special night that took me back to a special moment 3 years prior. the moon sometimes looks so beautiful.
trackinfo.credits: from An Ode To What Everything Once Was, And What It Will Forever Be., released August 11, 2021

trackinfo.title: vertigo
trackinfo.credits: from An Ode To What Everything Once Was, And What It Will Forever Be., released August 11, 2021

trackinfo.title: the day you weren't okay was the day my faith in myself died
trackinfo.about: a difficult position to be put in when you can't care for someone because they push you away even though they need it.
trackinfo.credits: from An Ode To What Everything Once Was, And What It Will Forever Be., released August 11, 2021

trackinfo.title: galaxy
trackinfo.about: so much has changed for the better, yet i know that any moment i can fall back into depression and heartache.
trackinfo.credits: from An Ode To What Everything Once Was, And What It Will Forever Be., released August 11, 2021

trackinfo.title: An Ode To What Everything Once Was, And What It Will Forever Be
trackinfo.credits: from An Ode To What Everything Once Was, And What It Will Forever Be., released August 11, 2021

she's my melancholy.title: our time, you, and the stars
she's my melancholy.credits:
released March 7, 2021
thank you to leo

trackinfo.title: motivation
trackinfo.lyrics: i've set my expectations so ungodly high that i don't even try anymore, because i'll probably fail. and this is something i should change in myself and actually change it, instead of just saying i will it's whats stopped me from starting earlier so many years ago. i spent a lot of my time unhappy feeling sorry for myself. my lack of motivation haltered me from working my hardest to make things i was proud of. my fear of failure and my obsession with success completely submerged me. my overthoughts about the world haven't helped either. in thinking too much about everything i've completely lost touch with myself. i think i need to take a break from everything i do and come back as a stronger, more motivated person who thinks of my work as a passion project; rather than something that could be my career.
trackinfo.about:
the recording of me speaking was recorded last year and i decided to use it in this.
it describes my struggle with keeping myself motivated, and my struggle to push myself into new projects.
pushing myself to create these songs has really helped motivate me and i'm past the point of no return now.
i'm very happy to break through this motivation barrier finally.
trackinfo.credits: from our time, you, and the stars, released March 7, 2021

trackinfo.title: bedroom
trackinfo.about:
i'm a very indoor person, and i've spent more time than anywhere in my bedroom.
during the pandemic lockdowns, it's the only place i really am.
in my bedroom i have my guitars, my piano, my pc, and my ukes. it's enough for me.
i've came to realise i should spend more time outside though.
trackinfo.credits: from our time, you, and the stars, released March 7, 2021

trackinfo.title: heatherfields
trackinfo.lyrics: i want to lie on the concrete and drink with my friend. he will tell me about how it feels to love, i know it. his voice will be everything in that moment and i'll tell him about you. i'll tell him about the time we spent together, and i'll tell him about how madly in love with you i felt. and i'll tell him about the small things that keep me awake at night. he shares with me his tales of love and reassures me it's okay to feel alone in the most social time of my life. i'm drunk and i'm lying on the cold night's concrete talking about a girl who found her way into my heart from the first time i heard her voice sing the notes i couldn't we fell silent and i stared into the sky, into you.
trackinfo.about:
the ideas for heatherfields were created and recorded a very long time ago.
originally it was longer and more descriptive but i removed many parts of it.
heartbreak sometimes isn't fathomable at the time of it happening.
it's not about anyone in particular, whether you believe that or not.
trackinfo.credits: from our time, you, and the stars, released March 7, 2021

trackinfo.title: outer peace
trackinfo.about:
outer peace started as a school project. it was totally free composition and i could replicate any sound that i desired.
i settled for an ambient lo-fi mix encapsulating the feeling of being free in nature.
i've been brought up in a very beautiful and natural landscape. growing up around here brings many nostalgic memories.
whenever i go outside, i never take where i live for granted. it's peaceful. i should spend more time there.
trackinfo.credits: from our time, you, and the stars, released March 7, 2021

trackinfo.title: holding on
trackinfo.about:
sometimes in a crowd of people, they're the only one you can see.
your attention is fixated on them sometimes.
you do your best to ignore them because that's what's best.
holding on to your sanity by a thread. you'll get over it, it's okay.
trackinfo.credits: from our time, you, and the stars, released March 7, 2021

trackinfo.title: our time
trackinfo.lyrics: (its incomprehensible that)...the fact that time didn't exist the fact that.. the constant marching forward of time didn't exist. (yeah, i understand what you're saying) like.. black holes suck in light they crush light they crush time.
trackinfo.about:
this is the second single release i put out.
the time i spend with my friends is the most valuble.
life is a strange thing. the amount of things we don't understand about time and dimensions is scary.
the vocal sample is a recording of my friend leo talking about this very subject.
time is physical.
trackinfo.credits: from our time, you, and the stars, released March 7, 2021

she's my melancholy.title: our time
she's my melancholy.about: this piece is really special to me, and it's about a night i hold dearly to my heart. thank you to my friend Leo for allowing me to use the audio clip of him talking. i love you man.

she's my melancholy.about: first released single from my upcoming EP, "our time, you, and the stars".
